hero.headline: Your driveway *deserves better* than cracks
hero.subheadline: Professional sealcoating and striping that keeps your pavement looking sharp year after year.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Sealcoating & Striping Done Right
services_section.subheading: Everything your pavement needs to look professional and last longer

services.title: Driveway Sealcoating
services.description: Protective coating that seals out water, oil, and weather damage. Extends pavement life by years.

services.title: Parking Lot Striping
services.description: Clean, straight lines for parking spaces, fire lanes, and handicap zones. Professional appearance that lasts.

services.title: Crack Sealing
services.description: Fill and seal cracks before they spread. Prevents water damage and costly repairs down the road.

services.title: Line Repainting
services.description: Fresh paint for faded or worn parking lot lines. Bright, visible markings that meet city codes.

about.heading: Bowling Green Pavement Specialists
about.body: We're a Bowling Green team that shows up when scheduled and finishes the job right. One call handles your entire pavement project.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Bowling Green & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional sealcoating and striping throughout Warren County

cta.heading: Ready for Fresh Pavement?
cta.body: Free estimates on all sealcoating and striping projects. We'll assess your pavement and give you straight pricing.
